summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for FinAI Arabic RTL Audit Platform. All 10 requested features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Login, Dashboard, Document Upload, OCR Processing, OCR Evidence List/Detail, Arabic Report, PDF Download, Compliance Overview, and Audit Findings pages all working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Login flow - authentication with admin@finai.com / adminpassword works correctly, redirects to dashboard
2. Dashboard page loads after login - shows stats (2 documents, 50 transactions, 16 accounts, 4 findings, 75% compliance)
3. Document Upload page (/documents/upload/) - page loads with file input, document type dropdown, language dropdown, handwritten checkbox
4. Document OCR Upload - uploaded test_invoice.png, OCR processed successfully with 69% confidence, extracted invoice number 12845, VAT number, total amount 750.00 SAR
5. OCR Evidence List page (/ocr/) - shows 2 evidence records with confidence scores, word counts, dates
6. OCR Evidence Detail page - shows extracted text, metadata (tesseract 5.3.0, processing time 3769ms), structured data extraction
7. Arabic Report page (/report/arabic/) - renders with executive summary, findings breakdown, compliance scores, PDF download button
8. PDF Report Download (/report/pdf/) - downloads valid PDF file (47KB, audit_report_FinAI_Demo_Company_20260127.pdf)
9. Compliance Overview page (/compliance/) - shows 91% overall score, 100% ZATCA, 85% VAT, 90% Zakat, ZATCA invoices table, VAT reconciliation, Zakat calculation
10. Audit Findings page (/findings/) - shows 4 findings with risk level badges, filters work, detail page shows AI analysis and regulatory references
seed_data_creation: Test data already seeded: 50 transactions, 16 accounts, 4 audit findings, 10 ZATCA invoices, 1 VAT reconciliation, 1 Zakat calculation
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly. Django template-based frontend with Arabic RTL layout. Login with admin@finai.com/adminpassword. OCR upload tested with /tmp/test_invoice.png - extracts invoice number, VAT number, amounts. PDF download generates valid Arabic audit report. All pages accessible: Dashboard (/), Compliance (/compliance/), Findings (/findings/), Document Upload (/documents/upload/), OCR List (/ocr/), Arabic Report (/report/arabic/), PDF Download (/report/pdf/).

design_review.rtl_layout: Correctly implemented with dir='rtl' and lang='ar'
design_review.typography: IBM Plex Sans Arabic font applied throughout
design_review.color_scheme: Minimal professional colors - slate-800 nav, slate-50 background, appropriate risk level colors (red for critical, orange for high, yellow for medium, green for low)
design_review.tables: Data-dense tables with proper Arabic headers and RTL alignment
design_review.navigation: 6 menu items in Arabic (Dashboard, Compliance, Findings, Transactions, Accounts, Reports)
design_review.contrast: Good contrast throughout - dark nav on light background, readable text

mocked_apis.note: AI explanations (ai_explanation_ar field in AuditFinding model) are populated with static seeded data, not live LLM calls
